item.name: Authentic Valentione Lobster Platter
item.description:
An authentically sumptuous plate of boiled and buttered lobster. Comes complete with a heart-shaped pizza. For reasons...of authenticity.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Determination Bonus: +4% (Max 10)
VIT Bonus: +5% (Max 12)
Gear Durability Bonus: +3
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
